findings.description: Property names `httpAccessLogFormatter.parametersOutputEnabled` and `httpAccessLogFormatter.dispatchingClassOutputEnabled` are present in the configuration table in s2 content but missing from s2 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source property table lists `httpAccessLogFormatter.parametersOutputEnabled` (hiddenパラメータ復号後の出力が有効か否か) and `httpAccessLogFormatter.dispatchingClassOutputEnabled` (ディスパッチ先クラス決定後の出力が有効か否か). Both appear in the app-log.properties example as well. The hints list includes `httpAccessLogFormatter.beginOutputEnabled` and `httpAccessLogFormatter.endOutputEnabled` but omits these two.
